response.justification: While Bogdan brings 20 years of solid engineering experience with impressive technical breadth across multiple platforms and languages, the resume demonstrates a critical gap for this AI Strategy role: no demonstrated expertise in artificial intelligence, machine learning, or AI-powered product development. The position requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—there is no evidence of this. Additionally, his recent career trajectory has focused on individual contributor product engineering rather than strategic innovation or advisory work with enterprise customers, and he lacks the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field. He would be a strong candidate for a general Principal Engineer role, but not for this specialized AI strategy position.
strengths: 20 years of deep technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering with demonstrated ability to learn multiple programming languages and paradigms
Proven leadership and mentoring capability through organizing coding dojos, creating technical workshops, and mentoring teams across multiple organizations
Full-stack engineering expertise with recent hands-on experience in cloud technologies (AWS CDK), emerging frameworks (MCP), and infrastructure-as-code (Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Complete absence of AI or machine learning expertise—no mention of ML models, AI platforms, or AI-powered products despite this being the core requirement of the role
No demonstrated experience at strategic or director level; career shows individual contributor and team lead roles, not advising strategic customers or identifying platform-level opportunities
Recent engineering work focuses on product execution rather than strategic innovation; lacks evidence of identifying and testing strategic opportunities for differentiation

key_factors.factor: No AI/ML expertise or AI products
Lack of strategic/director-level and customer advisory experience
Strong technical breadth and 20 years engineering experience
